summary: The implementation successfully delivers all 9 required features with proper Hindi text, color scheme, and interactive behaviors. The splash screen, header, user greeting, analysis buttons, about/pro sections, and hidden analysis box are all implemented with correct styling and functionality. No missing requirements detected.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer section with copyright text and caffeine.ai attribution link
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not specify a footer section with attribution links. This appears to be a platform-standard addition not requested in the requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: File size display and removal functionality in analysis box
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-8 specifies video upload input and acceptance of video formats, but does not request file size display (in MB) or individual file removal buttons with X icons.

hallucinated_features.description: Loading/analyzing animation with spinning gear emoji and progress text
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-8 mentions AI scanning will be activated but does not specify a loading animation with 'AI स्कैनिंग चल रही है...' message and spinning emoji during analysis.
